no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: ddx bead show axon-243091c3 | rg 'axon-77f3a5ca|axon-5956e527|axon-100687fd|decomposed' && ddx bead show axon-77f3a5ca && ddx bead show axon-5956e527 && ddx bead show axon-100687fd

Size-check result: decomposed, no implementation attempted.

Reason:
The bead was too large for one bounded execution pass after reading the current
worktree. The parent bead assumes the closed executor dependency provides
crates/axon-cypher/src/executor.rs and crates/axon-cypher/src/memory_store.rs,
but those files are absent in this worktree. The dependency commit recorded on
axon-ad2a9669 resolves to a checkpoint commit, not an executor implementation.

Implementing axon-243091c3 directly would therefore mix dependency repair,
streaming executor implementation, StorageAdapter production backend work,
SQLite integration parity, and performance benchmarks in one pass.

Child slices created:

- axon-77f3a5ca: build(feat-009): Cypher executor streaming runtime foundation
  Restores the missing executor foundation: QueryStore trait, execute(plan,
  store), in-memory store, and the 10+ executor scenarios from the dependency
  contract.

- axon-5956e527: build(feat-009): Cypher QueryStore over StorageAdapter
  Implements the production QueryStore over axon-storage::StorageAdapter using
  portable get/range_scan/index_lookup/link primitives only.

- axon-100687fd: test(feat-009): SQLite Cypher executor parity and ready/blocked benchmarks
  Reuses the executor scenarios against SqliteStorageAdapter and records the
  FEAT-009 DDx ready/blocked latency evidence at 1k and 10k beads.

Parent tracker update:
axon-243091c3 notes now record the decomposition and rationale. The parent
depends on all three children; axon-5956e527 depends on axon-77f3a5ca, and
axon-100687fd depends on axon-5956e527.
